productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Swerve Str White Sports Shoes
description: For all you lovers of tennis, here's a great shoe from adidas that can help shape you into a winner. The Swerve STR tennis shoe is a classic tough shoe that provides a timeless layout and absolute grip, allowing you to concentrate on any sport with ease. Upper Synthetic leather upper engineered with perforations for absolute durability and breathable comfort Meshed and padded collar and tongue for enhanced breathability Meshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Ergonomically curved and padded foot-bed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA injected insole that offers impact protection when hitting the ground at hard speeds Outsole Rubber outsole with herringbone grooves and pivot point on the forefoot for ease of movement and enhanced durability Torsion system for better torsion-ability Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
